title: Project Miner PM Intake Brief Export
objective: Add a local-only Markdown PM intake brief export to /pm-review/import-intake so the current Project Miner intake state can be shared for review or executor handoff without adding approval, persistence, import mutation, backend endpoints, hosted deployment, or live business-state writes.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / Local Implementation Executor
implementation_summary: Added a client-only Export PM Brief action to the Project Miner import-intake workbench.
The brief is generated entirely from the already-loaded import candidate, admission plan, approval contract, and approval storage plan reads.

The exported Markdown includes project identity, source freshness, proposed counts, warning signals, PM decisions, workflow gates, admission/approval status, future approval table and route, target rows, and not-allowed-now guardrails.
The export uses a local browser download and does not call a backend route, mutation route, clipboard API, hosted service, Supabase, Render, or Vercel.
A read-only sidecar independently confirmed the local Markdown export scope and recommended content assertions.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed and route output included /pm-review/import-intake.

Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after verifying the downloaded Markdown brief filename, content, no-server-write status, exact four reads, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import buttons.
Focused PM intake Playwright suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
hosted_status: local_current_only; hosted promotion remains assigned to PM Lane 041A/041B
